mapper.select: SELECT C.CARE_NUMBER, C.CARE_TITLE, TO_CHAR(C.CARE_WRITE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CARE_WRITE_DATE, NVL(A.APPLY_COUNT, 0) AS APPLY_COUNT, C.CARE_RECRUIT FROM DDD_CARE C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CA.CARE_NUMBER, COUNT(*) AS APPLY_COUNT FROM DDD_CARE_APPLY CA GROUP BY CA.CARE_NUMBER ) A ON C.CARE_NUMBER = A.CARE_NUMBER WHERE C.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY C.CARE_NUMBER DESC
